===================
===================
=== bd1989-08-10-cincinnati-LTC.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
Riverbend
Cincinnati, Ohio
August 10, 1989

LTC recording; most likely derived from LB-1200. Received in trade as FLAC on data DVD, coming inside a folder labeled as "1989.08.10 Cincinnatti (PL master)", with no other info available. Filenames like "1/Track01". Converted flacs back to shn and renamed files as the LB set, but md5 signatures still didn't match those of the referred LB #.
Had discs switched. Track times, however, did match those of the LB reference. Checked all files in Adobe Audition and found them all right (dff report is also included), so I just kept the FLAC filset as received, files renamed, though, placed back in their correct order.

Taper: LTC
Lineage: same recording as LB-1200 > ? > FLAC (flac v1.1.0)

Tracklist:

Disc 1 [47.27.451] 

01. [05:51.533] Most Likely You Go Your Way (And I'll Go Mine)
02. [04:20.080] Absolutely Sweet Marie
03. [06:09.813] Ballad Of Hollis Brown
04. [05:24.426] Watching The River Flow
05. [06:38.453] I Want You
06. [05:30.160] You're A Big Girl Now
07. [06:25.786] Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic)
08. [07:07.200] One Too Many Mornings (acoustic) 

Disc 2 [47.21.718] 

01. [08:19.360] The Lonesome Death Of Hattie Carroll (acoustic)
02. [03:49.200] Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35
03. [03:40.040] I'm In The Mood For Love
04. [05:07.773] Silvio
05. [04:19.013] I Shall Be Released
06. [08:46.773] Like A Rolling Stone
07. [08:21.186] Mr. Tambourine Man (acoustic)
08. [04:58.373] All Along The Watchtower

Total Time [94:49.169] 

further info: http://www.bjorner.com/DSN10060%20-%201989%20North%20America%20Summer%20Tour.htm#DSN10350

Enjoy!

Luisbp51 (Hungercity April 29, 2010)
